name: Boxty (Potato Griddle Cakes) (Irish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the raw potatoes.
2. Mix grated potatoes with cooked mashed potatoes.
3. Add salt, pepper, and flour to the mixture.
4. Beat the egg and add it to the mixture along with enough milk to form a batter that can be spooned from a fork.
5. Cook tablespoonfuls of the batter on a hot griddle or frying pan.
6. Flip the cakes over after 3-4 minutes on each side.
7. Serve with tart apple sauce or as part of an Ulster Fry with fried bacon, sausage, eggs, black pudding, bread, and soda bread.
